_README: Copy this to accounts.local.json (gitignored) and fill in secrets.
It is merged BY id onto config.json -> providers[*].accounts[*] at load time.
(1) apiKey account  -> { id, envKey, apiKey }  (the key is set as env[envKey] before spawn)
(2) login account   -> { id, configDir }       (a pre-logged-in CLI config dir; no secret here)

accounts._setup: ChatGPT-plan login dir: run `CODEX_HOME=~/.codex-a codex` once and complete login. The engine sets CODEX_HOME=~/.codex-a per dispatch — no key needed here.
